originalTitle: How does the current global oil crisis compare with the 1973 oil embargo?
title: How does the current global oil crisis compare with the 1973 oil embargo?
content: The 1973 oil embargo removed 4.5 million barrels per day from global supply. Today, that figure stands at 20 million.
